title: How to verify the account
excerpt: Have you ever faced issues verifying the account? What did you do? I’m probably looking for a decent service I can use to do that.

posts.author: fordangele (Angele)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you ever faced issues verifying the account? What did you do? I’m probably looking for a decent service I can use to do that.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @fordangele

Welcome to the Community!

Are you able to expand a little on what you mean by verifying an account?
If you’re referring to verifying your user account when signing up for the platform, you should receive an email to do this.
If you haven’t been able to receive this our support team would be happy to help!
You can contact them via support@monday.com
